anvil:aws:SvelteKitSite.description: SvelteKitSite is an Anvil-managed SvelteKit deployment on AWS. Static assets go to S3 behind CloudFront. Server code runs on Lambda.

domain.description: Custom domain name for the site. When set, Anvil configures DNS and TLS certificates automatically.

environment.description: Environment variables injected at both build time and runtime. Build time: available via $env/static and import.meta.env during static generation and prerendering. Runtime: set on the compute service (Lambda/Cloud Run) for SSR and API routes via $env/dynamic.

path.description: Path to the SvelteKit project directory, relative to the project root (where anvil.yaml lives). Not relative to the anvil.config file.

transform.description: Transform overrides for underlying AWS resources.

bucketName.description: The S3 bucket name storing static assets.

cloudFrontDistributionId.description: The CloudFront distribution ID serving the site.

dnsRecords.description: DNS records the user needs to create (if domain is set and not on Route53). Empty if no domain or if Route53 records were created automatically.

functionName.description: The Lambda function name running SSR.

url.description: The URL where the site is accessible.
